content: Briefly, what is courierbot?
courierbot is the sends receipts and payment notifications. Its p99 SLO is 250ms.
Who owns gatekeeper and on which port does it run?
gatekeeper is owned by the Edge & Traffic team and listens on port 7443.
Briefly, what is pulseboard?
pulseboard is the internal metrics and alerting dashboard. Its p99 SLO is 150ms.
Who owns courierbot and on which port does it run?
courierbot is owned by the Payments team and listens on port 7230.
What does error NBX-2202 mean and what is the fix?
NBX-2202 is raised by quillbase: replication lag above 30s. Fix: pause streamforge consumers, let lag drain below 5s, then resume
Reply with only the port number of mistral-cache.
Reply with only the port number of gatekeeper.
Briefly, what is streamforge?
streamforge is the event streaming and change-data-capture pipeline. Its p99 SLO is 90ms.
Reply with only the port number of vaultkeep.
What does error NBX-1102 mean and what is the fix?
NBX-1102 is raised by tokensmith: token validation latency above SLO. Fix: check vaultkeep health first; if healthy, scale tokensmith to 4 replicas
Who owns mistral-cache and on which port does it run?
mistral-cache is owned by the Edge & Traffic team and listens on port 7460.
Reply with only the port number of courierbot.
Who owns tokensmith and on which port does it run?
tokensmith is owned by the Core Platform team and listens on port 7020.
What is the NimbusWorks secrets policy? One sentence.
Secrets may only be read through vaultkeep; direct file access is a fireable offense.
Reply with only the port number of glacierdocs.
Reply with only the port number of tokensmith.
What is the NimbusWorks rollback policy? One sentence.
Any deploy showing error-rate increase above 2% within 15 minutes must be rolled back with `nbx deploy rollback <service>`.
What is the NimbusWorks capacity policy? One sentence.
Services must run at least 2 replicas in prod; payments services at least 3.
What is the NimbusWorks sev1 policy? One sentence.
A Sev1 incident requires paging the service team lead within 10 minutes and posting to #incident-bridge.
Briefly, what is mistral-cache?
mistral-cache is the edge response cache (LRU, 64GB per node). Its p99 SLO is 15ms.
What does error NBX-1101 mean and what is the fix?
NBX-1101 is raised by tokensmith: token signing key rotation failed. Fix: run `nbx keys rotate --service tokensmith --force`, then restart tokensmith
Reply with only the port number of quillbase.
Briefly, what is ledgerline?
ledgerline is the payment ledger; records all transactions. Its p99 SLO is 200ms.
Briefly, what is quillbase?
quillbase is the primary OLTP database proxy. Its p99 SLO is 60ms.
Reply with only the port number of streamforge.
Who owns pulseboard and on which port does it run?
pulseboard is owned by the Core Platform team and listens on port 7050.
Who owns streamforge and on which port does it run?
streamforge is owned by the Data Services team and listens on port 7320.
What does error NBX-2201 mean and what is the fix?
NBX-2201 is raised by quillbase: connection pool exhausted. Fix: raise pool_max to 512 via `nbx config set quillbase pool_max 512` and restart
What is the NimbusWorks deploy-freeze policy? One sentence.
Production deploys are frozen every Friday 18:00 UTC through Monday 06:00 UTC.
Briefly, what is gatekeeper?
gatekeeper is the API gateway; terminates TLS and routes external requests. Its p99 SLO is 120ms.
Who owns glacierdocs and on which port does it run?
glacierdocs is owned by the Data Services team and listens on port 7340.
Briefly, what is tokensmith?
tokensmith is the issues and validates NimbusAuth session tokens. Its p99 SLO is 40ms.
What does error NBX-5501 mean and what is the fix?
NBX-5501 is raised by streamforge: consumer group stalled. Fix: run `nbx stream rewind --group <group> --to-checkpoint` then unpause
Reply with only the port number of pulseboard.
Who owns quillbase and on which port does it run?
quillbase is owned by the Data Services team and listens on port 7305.
Who owns vaultkeep and on which port does it run?
vaultkeep is owned by the Core Platform team and listens on port 7030.
Reply with only the port number of ledgerline.
What does error NBX-3302 mean and what is the fix?
NBX-3302 is raised by mistral-cache: cache hit rate below 40%. Fix: verify cache keys include the region prefix; flush with `nbx cache flush --node all`
Briefly, what is glacierdocs?
glacierdocs is the document archive and retrieval service. Its p99 SLO is 300ms.
What does error NBX-4401 mean and what is the fix?
NBX-4401 is raised by ledgerline: double-entry imbalance detected. Fix: freeze writes with `nbx ledger freeze`, run `nbx ledger reconcile`, page Payments lead
Briefly, what is vaultkeep?
vaultkeep is the secrets and key-material store. Its p99 SLO is 25ms.
What does error NBX-3301 mean and what is the fix?
NBX-3301 is raised by gatekeeper: upstream connect timeout. Fix: check tokensmith health; gatekeeper retries do NOT apply to POST routes
Who owns ledgerline and on which port does it run?
ledgerline is owned by the Payments team and listens on port 7210.
